top_signals.title: Oil prices rise as investors continue to watch U.S.-Iran moves, Citi sees 'overhang' disappearing
top_signals.summary: Oil rises slightly early Tuesday as investors continue to assess the latest developments in the Middle East, while showing optimism the conflict may end soon.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: China Links Offshore, Onshore Yuan in Tweak Toward Broader Use
top_signals.summary: China is taking another step in its longstanding push to build a more global currency, bringing its domestic and offshore yuan markets a little closer together.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Ground view Kazakhstan: The visibility bargain
top_signals.summary: Qarmet, a Kazakhstani steel and mining company, inherited deadly mines and responded with extensive surveillance.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
